query:
-- Limpar logs de admin restantes (todos são de desenvolvimento)
DELETE FROM admin_logs;

-- Verificação final: contagem de todas as tabelas
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'pools', COUNT(*) FROM pools
UNION ALL SELECT 'pool_members', COUNT(*) FROM pool_members
UNION ALL SELECT 'bets', COUNT(*) FROM bets
UNION ALL SELECT 'games', COUNT(*) FROM games
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournaments', COUNT(*) FROM tournaments
UNION ALL SELECT 'teams', COUNT(*) FROM teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'admin_logs', COUNT(*) FROM admin_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_plans', COUNT(*) FROM user_plans
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_badges', COUNT(*) FROM user_badges
UNION ALL SELECT 'ads', COUNT(*) FROM ads
UNION ALL SELECT 'referrals', COUNT(*) FROM referrals
UNION ALL SELECT 'email_queue', COUNT(*) FROM email_queue
UNION ALL SELECT 'push_subscriptions', COUNT(*) FROM push_subscriptions;

-- Limpar logs de admin restantes (todos são de desenvolvimento)
DELETE FROM admin_logs;

-- Verificação final: contagem de todas as tabelas
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'pools', COUNT(*) FROM pools
UNION ALL SELECT 'pool_members', COUNT(*) FROM pool_members
UNION ALL SELECT 'bets', COUNT(*) FROM bets
UNION ALL SELECT 'games', COUNT(*) FROM games
UNION ALL SELECT 'tournaments', COUNT(*) FROM tournaments

UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'admin_logs', COUNT(*) FROM admin_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_plans', COUNT(*) FROM user_plans
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_badges', COUNT(*) FROM user_badges
UNION ALL SELECT 'ads', COUNT(*) FROM ads
UNION ALL SELECT 'referrals', COUNT(*) FROM referrals
UNION ALL SELECT 'email_queue', COUNT(*) FROM email_queue
UNION ALL SELECT 'push_subscriptions', COUNT(*) FROM push_subscriptions;
